intro.dialogue_0: A foul stench and the piercing sound of cold metal scrape against your eardrums.
intro.dialogue_1:
The Necromancer, who once ruled the world by blurring the line between life and death,
now lies prostrate on the freezing floor of a decaying terminal.
intro.dialogue_2:
The arrogance of believing you had transcended death has shattered like glass shards,
and the majesty that once commanded armies has sunk without a trace into the silent dark.
intro.dialogue_3:
??? : "Still haven't opened those pathetic eyes, I see.
Discard the memories of that trivial world you once ruled."
intro.dialogue_4:
A mocking voice echoes through the darkness.
It is the undeniable manifestation of 'Death' itself—the very thing the Necromancer so desperately denied.
intro.dialogue_5:
??? : "In this Terminal, you are nothing but a laborer, clearing rotten tracks and hauling corpses.
If you're lucky... you might stay breathing until the next train arrives."
intro.dialogue_6:
Humiliating taunts pour down, but the Necromancer's body feels unnaturally heavy,
leaving him without even the strength to resist.
intro.dialogue_7:
Veins bulge atop the hand gripping the floor.
Beyond crushed pride, only a suppressed, cold murderous intent begins to fester.
intro.dialogue_8:
??? : "Go. Go wallow with the filth that suits you,
and serve the very death you loathed so much."
intro.dialogue_9:
As the massive iron gate shrieks open,
a spectacle of tens of thousands of souls—waiting for eternal rest or horrific punishment—unfolds.
intro.dialogue_10:
A place where the desperate screams of souls lined up for final judgment
mingle with the roar of giant machinery carving away their sins.
intro.dialogue_11:
The 'Floor of Judgment,' where order and madness coexist.
The chilling air of B1 greets the one who was once a master of the dead.

loading.resource: Summoning the wails of the dead and hollow vessels...

scene.start: The shriek of rusted steel cuts through the floors, reaching the gates of '{{name}}'...
scene.complete: The vibration stops. The air beyond the gates has changed.

found_soul: You have found fragments of your soul.

pick.lootbag_recover_msg: You recover the scattered soul fragments ({{exp}} EXP) and old coins ({{gold}} G).
pick.lootbag_flavor_text: Death was not the end, but the pain of it still lingers at your fingertips.

talk.no_one_here: There is no one here to speak with.
talk.select_npc: Who do you wish to speak with?

description.karma_0: A guide of souls who honors the dead and upholds the natural order.
description.karma_5: The weight of slaughter is slowly seeping into your shadow.
description.karma_10: Corrupt magic consumes your conscience, and your gaze grows clouded.
description.karma_max: A cruel minion of the Reaper, transcending the laws of the living.
